issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Instructions assume bash and ssh-copy-id, which may not be available on all platforms.

scenarios.name: SSH config with bastion + wildcard dev hosts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ProxyJump plus the Host dev-* wildcard with %h substitution from the skill so any dev-<x> alias works; baseline falls back to ProxyCommand -W and individual host entries.

scenarios.name: ED25519 key + local port forward via bastion
scenarios.rationale: Treatment leads with ssh-keygen -t ed25519, includes both ssh-copy-id and the manual cat | ssh fallback, and uses ssh -L 5432:db.internal:5432 bastion; baseline defaults to RSA and skips the manual fallback.
